content: Transitory Provision All rights, privileges, and benefits previously enjoyed by Filipino seafarers before the effectivity of RA No. 12021, including those set forth in the Presidential Decree 442, as amended, otherwise known as “Labor Code of the Philippines”, and Republic Act No. 8042, as amended, shall continue to be recognized and shall not be diminished after the effectivity of RA No. 12021. The transition period provided under Section 23 of Republic Act No. 11641, shall likewise be taken into consideration. With respect to the maritime higher education institutions and maritime education programs, MARINA and CHED shall establish a transition plan within a reasonable period of time after the effectivity of this IRR.
